title: Argentina vs France · 2022 WC Final · Lusail Stadium

keyStats.final_hat_trick: first in a WC Final since Geoff Hurst in 1966

facts: Argentina defeated France on penalties after a 3-3 extra-time draw
Messi scored two goals: a 23rd-minute penalty and a 108th-minute extra-time goal
Mbappé scored a hat-trick including goals at 80' and 81' — the fastest two-minute two-goal brace in a WC Final
Di María scored the second Argentina goal at 36' after assisting Messi's opener
Most-watched football match in history — approximately 1.5 billion viewers
Mbappé's hat-trick was the first in a WC Final since Geoff Hurst in 1966 for England
Messi's 23rd-minute penalty was his first goal in a World Cup Final
Argentina won 4-2 on penalties; Gonzalo Montiel scored the winning kick
Messi won the Golden Ball (tournament MVP) for the second time
Mbappé won the Golden Boot with 8 goals
Emiliano Martínez saved 2 penalties in the shootout and won the Golden Glove
Peter Drury's 'Lionel Messi ascends to football heaven' is the most-viewed broadcast moment of the match
Played at Lusail Stadium, Qatar on 18 December 2022
storylines: Messi's 5th and final World Cup — closes the circle after 2014 loss to Germany
Mbappé chasing Golden Boot (won it with 8)
France chasing back-to-back titles, last achieved by Brazil in 1958-62
Scaloni's Argentina rebuilt around Messi after 2018 failure
